popularStory.headline: Cockayne Families
popularStory.description:
Is there another Old Derbshire family with such memorabilia for the historian, with so many vicissitudes and so many dramatic episodes, as the Cokaynes? 

Derbyshire provides much of the finest scener …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Cokayne於1356年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，他的父親John Cockayne31歲，母親Cecelia Vernon26歲。他與Elizabeth de Harthull結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1403年7月21日在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cokayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cockayne
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): nickname for a dreamer, from Middle English cokayne ‘cloud-cuckooland’, the name of an imaginary paradise (Old French (pays de) cocaigne, from Middle Low German kōkenje, a diminutive of kōke ‘cake’, since in this land the houses were thought to be made of cake). It may also be a variant of Cocking or from the unflattering Middle English nickname cokin (Old French coquin) ‘disreputable person’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Cokayne was born in 1356, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, his father, John Cockayne, was 31 and his mother, Cecelia Vernon, was 26. He married Elizabeth de Harthull. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 July 1403, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Ashborne, Derbyshire, Eng: Ashbourne with Mapleton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Cokayne est né en 1356, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John Cockayne, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Cecelia Vernon, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Harthull. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1403, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Ashborne, Derbyshire, Eng: Ashbourne with Mapleton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Cokayne 1356 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cockayne 31 und seine Mutter Cecelia Vernon 26. Er hat Elizabeth de Harthull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Juli 1403 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England und wurde in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth de Harthull. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. ko.Ashborne, Derbyshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애스h보우른 위스 마플레턴
ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Cokayne(이)가 1356년 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cockayne(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecelia Vernon(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Harthull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 7월 21일 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Cokayne nasceu em 1356, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cockayne, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Cecelia Vernon, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Harthull. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1403, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ashborne, Derbyshire, Eng: ашбурн вит маплетон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Cokayne родился в 1356 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Cockayne было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Cecelia Vernon, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Harthull. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 июля 1403 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
